visual_description: A dark silhouette of a car is parked on a hill against a dramatic, cloudy sky at dusk. A person in a dark uniform and cap walks into the frame from the right, their back to the camera, and stands still, looking out over the landscape. The scene is heavily silhouetted, with the only light coming from the sun setting behind the horizon.
audio_description: A female voice sings a slow, melancholic melody. The singing is clear and sustained, with a reverberating quality.
